food.name: Rice Cakes

identity.basisReason: Per-100g as-sold basis matches packaged snack labeling and avoids serving-size confusion from very light individual cakes.
includes: plain rice cakes without sweet coatings

scoreReadiness.summary: Good enough for launch scripting as a generic plain-rice-cakes record, but GI and protein-quality style fields are still generic rather than tightly source-locked.
blockers: exact GI varies by rice-cake product and rice processing method
protein-quality proxy metrics are still calibration leftovers rather than exact-source facts
micronutrient values can vary somewhat by brand and fortification status

sourceNotes: Identity locked to plain unsweetened puffed rice cakes, per 100 g as sold.
Core nutrient values align with generic packaged plain rice-cake nutrition profiles rather than flavored variants.
This remains a generic product-style record, not a brand-specific SKU.

sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 3g of fat. Saturated fat is a major pressure point. Fat is basically not the story here.
sections.subtitleText: 3g of fat. Saturated fat is a major pressure point. Fat is basically not the story here.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 81.5g of carbs. Fibre is doing a lot of the work here. For grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.
sections.subtitleText: 81.5g of carbs. Fibre is doing a lot of the work here. For grains, the carb quality matters much more than the raw number.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 7g of protein. Protein amount is doing most of the work here. Protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.
sections.subtitleText: 7g of protein. Protein amount is doing most of the work here. Protein helps, but not enough if the carb side is weak.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: Outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet.
sections.subtitleText: Outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: Magnesium at 13% daily value, iron at 7% daily value, zinc at 8% daily value stand out most. Useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: Magnesium at 13% daily value, iron at 7% daily value, zinc at 8% daily value stand out most. Useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: Pros first: portable and convenient. Very easy to use as a quick snack base. Easy to portion and carry. Simple packaging advantage. Works with many toppings. Practical flexibility for snack content.

displayItems.title: portable and convenient
displayItems.explanation: Very easy to use as a quick snack base.

sections.subtitleText: Pros first: portable and convenient. Very easy to use as a quick snack base. Easy to portion and carry. Simple packaging advantage. Works with many toppings. Practical flexibility for snack content.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: The drawbacks next: does not justify taking up your grain slot. Other grain foods usually bring much more actual nutritional value. Usually needs help to feel worthwhile. It often relies on toppings or pairings to become a decent snack. Not very filling for the calories. Can be unsatisfying unless built up with other foods.

closing.summary: Big strengths are portable and convenient and easy to portion and carry, but the biggest weaknesses are does not justify taking up your grain slot and usually needs help to feel worthwhile.
closing.overview: Big strengths are portable and convenient and easy to portion and carry, but the biggest weaknesses are does not justify taking up your grain slot and usually needs help to feel worthwhile.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only as a light snack base or texture food, not as a strong staple by itself.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
